name: Mirror Image

rulesText.description: Defensive misdirection for the elegant monster routine: attackers strike false angles while her real body keeps reshaping.

mechanics.label: Duplicates
mechanics.description: Three illusory duplicates protect you from attacks.

mechanics.label: Sight
mechanics.description: Blindsight, truesight, or not seeing you can bypass the spell.

desc: Defensive misdirection for the elegant monster routine: attackers strike false angles while her real body keeps reshaping.
